impact: Advances the PP&D guardrail plan by adding fixture-only validation that residential permit workflows compile to source-backed stop points and completeness checks before any DevHub submission, inspection scheduling, or payment action.
summary: Add deterministic residential building permit guardrail compiler fixture coverage for missing facts, document groups, Single PDF Process compatibility, inspection scheduling, and payment gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-53: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for the residential building permit workflow covering missing facts, required document groups, Single PDF Process compatibility, inspection-scheduling stop points, and payment stop points.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
